_comment: Opportunity: Abandoned Library. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 2000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Foundation Establishment), perception (Core Formation (to find hidden sections)), and luck (modifier 1.3). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Abandoned Library
description: A library of an extinct sect, containing rare techniques and lore. Exists because: a sect fell and its library was left behind.
why_untaken: Location lost; requires exploration or rumor to find.
natural_next_event: Library degrades; scrolls rot; knowledge lost.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
